overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from The Last of Us showing Joel exploring an abandoned house interior before transitioning to riding a horse with Ellie through an overgrown autumn university campus. The clip features high-quality game engine rendering with warm lighting and detailed environmental storytelling.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned house dining room and study

events.description: Joel walks from the study room through glass panel french doors into the main dining room
Joel stops walking forward and turns around to survey the dining room from the opposite side

agents.ego_description: Joel cautiously walking through the abandoned house, examining the dining room furniture and looking around the space

entered.detail: tall bookshelf filled with books against the wall in the initial room
wooden desk with drawers and items on top
open double doors with glass panels leading from study to dining room
long rectangular wooden dining table with white table runner
wooden chairs arranged around the dining table
ornate light fixture hanging from ceiling above the table
tall wooden cabinet with glass doors and wine rack base against the wall
framed artwork hanging on the walls depicting landscapes
tall windows with heavy curtains letting in natural light
white radiator heater beneath the windows
decorative rug covering the floor under the dining table

segments.scene_description: Joel explores the interior of an abandoned house, moving from a study area with a bookshelf into a spacious dining room featuring a long wooden table, chandelier, and hutch cabinet. Natural light filters through curtained windows onto the worn wooden floors as he walks around the table examining the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown university campus with abandoned buildings and autumn foliage

events.description: scene cuts from indoor house to outdoor university campus with Joel and Ellie riding a horse
text overlay 'The University' appears as they ride past the main campus buildings

agents.ego_description: Joel riding a brown horse along an overgrown path through the abandoned university campus, navigating around abandoned vehicles

notable_agents.action: Ellie sitting behind Joel on the horse, holding onto his shoulders and looking around

entered.detail: small brick building covered in ivy at the campus entrance
large metal archway spanning over the entrance road
trees with vibrant orange and yellow fall leaves
rusted and overgrown vehicles left on the roads
large multi-story brick buildings with many windows
tall grass and weeds covering the ground everywhere
worn path with gravel and dirt through the overgrown grass
tall lamp posts lining the path through campus
elevated enclosed walkway connecting university buildings

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an overgrown university campus where Joel and Ellie ride a horse along a gravel path. They pass a brick guardhouse and metal archway entrance, then continue past abandoned cars and red brick university buildings surrounded by dense autumn foliage and tall grass. The text 'The University' appears as they approach the main campus area with elevated walkways.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the intimate, dusty interior of an abandoned home to the expansive, overgrown grounds of a university campus. It begins inside a quiet study area, gliding past a bookshelf and into a spacious dining room where natural light filters through curtains onto a long wooden table and worn floors. As the camera moves beyond the domestic space, the scene shifts abruptly to an outdoor gravel path where Joel and Ellie ride a horse past a brick guardhouse and a metal archway. The environment then opens up into a wide campus landscape, passing abandoned cars and red brick buildings enveloped in dense autumn foliage and tall grass. Finally, the camera advances toward elevated walkways as the text The University appears, marking the arrival at the heart of the overgrown institution.
